labs.title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
labs.summary: Today, Google DeepMind and A24 are announcing a first-of-its-kind partnership focused on research. This partnership creates a deep research and development collaboration between A24 and Google DeepMind spanning multiple projects over time. This hands-on collaboration provides Google DeepMind with invaluable feedback and guidance from leading artists.

labs.title: Expanding our Heat Resilience data to 50+ global cities
labs.summary: This dataset is being made accessible through a new high-resolution Heat Resilience Earth Engine App. This dataset is open and accessible through our new, high-resolution Heat Resilience Earth Engine App . This platform provides high-resolution rooftop albedo (reflectivity) data to empower proactive municipal planning.

labs.title: Introducing TabFM: A zero-shot foundation model for tabular data
labs.summary: We introduce TabFM, a new foundation model for tabular data to simplify classification and regression workflows. Today, we introduce TabFM, a foundation model designed specifically for tabular data classification and regression. By framing tabular prediction as an ICL problem, TabFM eliminates the need for manual model training, hyperparameter tuning , and complex feature engineering.

labs.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
labs.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

labs.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
labs.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

labs.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
labs.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

labs.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity

labs.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI

The Govee Glide Hexa Light Panels are a simple and fun way to add some personality to your work desk setup without taking up any actual desk space.

startups.summary: This approach was long orthogonal to VC, and Bending Spoons remained bootstrapped for years. While Bending Spoons acquired several companies between 2014 and 2021, including the AI-powered photo enhancer Remini, its most notable acquisitions happened more recently. In November 2024, Bending Spoons announced it would spend $233 million on an all-cash take-private deal to acquire video platform Brightcove.

startups.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
startups.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, AI startup Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves. Disney and Universal sued Midjourney for alleged copyright infringement last year, noting that the startup’s image-generation models could create images of characters, such as Bart Simpson and Darth Vader, who are owned by the studios. startups.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
startups.summary: China’s Alibaba will ban employees from using Anthropic’s programming tool Claude Code, starting on July 10, according to multiple reports . Anthropic already prohibits Chinese companies, as well as foreign entities owned by those companies, from using its models. The company has reportedly been working to close loopholes that allow Chinese users to access Claude.

startups.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year

startups.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
startups.summary: The Browser Company, the startup behind the Arc browser, recently introduced Dia , its AI-centric browser that looks similar to Google Chrome but with an AI chat tool. OpenAI recently launched its AI-powered web browser, called Atlas . Zen Browser aims to create a “calmer internet” with its open source browser.

startups.title: The Dune keypad device can be your meeting controller and more
startups.summary: Dune ships with a companion app for configuring shortcuts, either per-app or system-wide. Within a given app, you can assign a Dune key to a keyboard shortcut, a command, or a link that opens an app or URL. The app also has a marketplace, from where you can explore skills made by other Dune owners.
